task_completion.description: Navigate to the Chart of Accounts in Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface should display the 'Chart of Accounts' page, typically accessed via the 'Settings' menu.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Freight and Delivery' expense account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filled-out 'New Account' form or a list entry showing Name: 'Freight and Delivery', Code: '5100', and Group: 'Expenses'.
A filled-out 'New Account' form or a list entry showing Name: 'Vehicle Maintenance', Code: '5200', and Group: 'Expenses'.
A filled-out 'New Account' form or a list entry showing Name: 'Professional Services', Code: '5300', and Group: 'Expenses'.

task_completion.description: Verify all three new accounts appear in the Chart of Accounts list under the 'Expenses' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final Chart of Accounts screen should display all three newly created accounts (Freight and Delivery, Vehicle Maintenance, Professional Services) with their respective codes (5100, 5200, 5300) correctly categorized under the 'Expenses' section.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse clicks, form typing, or navigation within the Manager.io web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the Manager.io accounting software, not a text editor, mock webpage, or database management tool.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the account details into the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting the specific account names, codes, and selecting the correct groups in the 'New Account' form, rather than the accounts magically appearing without form interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create exactly three accounts in Manager.io's Chart of Accounts (located in Settings). The required accounts are: 1) Name: 'Freight and Delivery', Code: '5100', Group: 'Expenses'. 2) Name: 'Vehicle Maintenance', Code: '5200', Group: 'Expenses'. 3) Name: 'Professional Services', Code: '5300', Group: 'Expenses'.
